MotherlodeGem.Description_57_239D8B8F423327A5CE6760836: NSLOCTEXT("", "9D922605448F16D60CE1AA8F9DCA57F9", "An uncut, pale-blue glowing gemstone, which weighs much more than it looks.\r\n\r\nThe Hyperion Crystal is one of the most valuable materials on Aethus.")

Ore_1.Description_57_239D8B8F423327A5CE6760836: NSLOCTEXT("", "4C946EF849AADDB9D04DFC8D62C020F7", "A dull grey metallic ore.\r\n\r\nHeavy but fairly soft, this ore creates bars with high tensile strength.")
Ore_1.Subtitle_72_EF06DD694B809ABB8B774EBDB910: NSLOCTEXT("", "1546579F44B164F385CE75B71608E2F5", "Must have this item in your inventory to place.")

Ore_10.Description_57_239D8B8F423327A5CE6760836: NSLOCTEXT("", "F72679C947BFEA24A655DB996534F4E0", "A mysterious, glowing mineral. It feels incredibly lightweight, almost as if it wants to float away.")
Ore_10.Subtitle_72_EF06DD694B809ABB8B774EBDB910: NSLOCTEXT("", "1546579F44B164F385CE75B71608E2F5", "Must have this item in your inventory to place.")

Ore_1_Bar.Description_57_239D8B8F423327A5CE6760836: NSLOCTEXT("", "C361E55A41CB19D993C6A092014B7C01", "A dull grey metal bar forged from Kalynite ore - these bars have high tensile strength, perfect for construction of habitats.")

Ore_2.Subtitle_72_EF06DD694B809ABB8B774EBDB910: NSLOCTEXT("", "1546579F44B164F385CE75B71608E2F5", "Must have this item in your inventory to place.")

Ore_3.Subtitle_72_EF06DD694B809ABB8B774EBDB910: NSLOCTEXT("", "1546579F44B164F385CE75B71608E2F5", "Must have this item in your inventory to place.")

Ore_6.Description_57_239D8B8F423327A5CE6760836: NSLOCTEXT("", "C62539FA42E8C4BF41B04EBEC70E19F5", "A fairly heavy metallic ore found near areas of the Lost World with a high concentration of standing water.\r\n\r\nRenowned electrical conductivity, but notoriously difficult to refine due to its low purity.")
Ore_6.Subtitle_72_EF06DD694B809ABB8B774EBDB910: NSLOCTEXT("", "1546579F44B164F385CE75B71608E2F5", "Must have this item in your inventory to place.")
